## Why

Describe the problem and intended outcome.

## What changed

Summarize the implementation.

## Verification

- [ ] Formatting, linting, type checks, and tests pass
- [ ] Tests cover behavior changes
- [ ] Documentation is current
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, account IDs, or session data are committed
- [ ] AWS resource and cost impact is documented

## Security impact

Describe changes to IAM, execution, authentication, networking, tenant isolation, or state persistence. Write `None` if not applicable.
